name: Notional amount schedule end date—Leg 2
description: These data elements describe the notional amount schedule of Leg 2 in terms of each schedule period’s end date applicable in the period.
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for certain Action types and not reported for other Action types.

Required for transactions in any asset class where Notional amount—Leg 1 is not a constant value over the entire term of the OTC derivative and the notional amount schedule information for Leg 2 is not the same as the notional amount schedule information for Leg 1.
If the notional amount schedule information of leg 2 is the same as the notional amount schedule information of leg 1, these data elements are not required to be reported.
Values for Notional amount schedule end date—Leg 2 may be optionally reported.
valueRules: If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
